pr.title: More dups and a ft link
pr.author: lukechampine

summary: Continuation PR that linked/matched ftCo_CaptureKirby and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby, adjusted Kirby capture split/symbol ownership, and applied many small stage/item/fighter data and code matching edits. Bot report recorded +4304 matched-code bytes, +2116 linked-code bytes, 18 new matches, 22 unmatched-item improvements, and one grbigblue unmatched-item regression.

key_files.role: Adjusted ftCommon Kirby capture .sdata ownership across ftCo_CaptureKirby, ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby, and ftCo_ThrownKirby.
Changed several data/sdata/sdata2 symbols from global/address-style names to local compiler-style @ labels and split a Castle stage data object into global plus local string objects.
Marked ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
Cleaned includes/literals, refactored capture helper code, added narrow PAD_STACK uses, and contributed new matches for ftCo_800BD1DC, ftCo_800BD39C, and .sdata.
Removed three extern string literal declarations after split/symbol ownership changes.
Changed stack padding shape in two Yoshi capture animation functions, producing two new one-byte matches per bot report.

Added stage data/report string storage and changed OSReport call to use offsets into stage data; bot report shows grBigBlue_801E59F8 matched and .data improved, with one unrelated grBigBlue unmatched-item regression noted.
Made callback arrays static and adjusted stage data/string layout; bot report shows grCastle_801CD4D0 matched and .data/.rodata improvements.
Small stage matching/data edit; exact hunk not fully loaded, bot report shows .data improvement and grCorneria_801DD534 score improvement.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grGreens_80213524 new match and .data improvement.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grHomeRun_8021C82C new match plus .data and .sdata improvements.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grIceMt_801F71E8 new match and .data improvement.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grKongo_801D5340 new match and large .data improvement.
Static header update associated with grkongo stage matching/data changes.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grMuteCity_801EFD0C new match and several score improvements.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grOldKongo_8020F52C new match and large .data improvement.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grOldPupupu_802108B4 new match plus .data and function-score improvements.
Stage matching/data edit; bot report shows grPura_80211E08 and grPura_80212024 new matches plus .data improvement.
Largest source edit by churn; bot report shows grVenom_80206874 and grVenom_80205AD4 large function-score improvements plus .sdata2 improvement, but no full hunk was loaded.
One-line item draw edit; exact hunk not loaded.

what_changed: PR body only states this is a continuation of #2572; no detailed author rationale was provided.
ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c were switched from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py.

Kirby capture split metadata was narrowed/redistributed so CaptureKirby owns .sdata 0x804D3BB0-0x804D3BC8, CaptureWaitKirby owns .sdata 0x804D3BC8-0x804D3BE0, and ThrownKirby owns .sdata 0x804D3BE0-0x804D3BF8.
Several previously global ftCo string/float/double symbols were converted to local @ labels in symbols.txt, and three literal extern declarations were removed from ftCo_ThrownKirby.c.

ftCo_CaptureKirby.c removed placeholder/platform/baselib/MetroTRK and unused ftCommon includes shown in the excerpt, removed explicit literal constants, moved ftCommon_InitGrab out of inlineA0, and used HSD_JObjGetScale/HSD_JObjSetScale with field-backed capture state.
Narrow stack-shape tactics were used in ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and ftKb_SpecialNYs.c, including PAD_STACK and explicit u8 _pad arrays.
Multiple gr stage files added or adjusted stage data, local data/static declarations, report strings, and callback/data layout to improve matching.
Bot report recorded 18 new matches and 22 unmatched-item improvements, including function matches across ftCo_CaptureKirby, ftKb_SpecialNYs, and many stage files.
Bot report recorded one unmatched-item regression for main/melee/gr/grbigblue grBigBlue_801E6364, with before and after both displayed as 94.01%.

smart_moves.text: Promoted only the two ftCommon units that the diff touched from NonMatching to Matching, rather than broadly changing nearby ftCommon build status.
Moved local literal ownership into splits/symbols metadata and removed matching C extern declarations in ftCo_ThrownKirby.c, reducing source-level fake literal declarations.
Used the bot report as narrow verification evidence for new matches and visible regression accounting.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When literal/string ownership belongs to a neighboring split, fix splits and symbols metadata instead of keeping source-local extern declarations for those literals.
For near-complete matches, very small stack-shape adjustments can close remaining bytes, but the evidence here is specific to the touched functions and backed by the bot's match report.

Stage data matching in this slice involved pairing C data-layout changes with symbols.txt metadata changes; the bot report shows both function matches and data-score improvements, but also flags regression risk.
evidence_refs: text_corpus:bot report stage data improvements and grbigblue regression

naming_conventions.convention: Compiler-local data/literal labels are represented as @NNN in symbols.txt when scope is local, replacing some previous lbl_/ftCo_ address-style globals in this PR.
Stage data symbols continue to use stage prefixes such as grBb_ and grCs_, while helper typedefs can be named from the stage prefix and role, e.g. grBb_StageData.
Unproven function names in the touched fighter/stage code remain address-style, e.g. ftCo_800BD39C, grKongo_801D5340, and grVenom_80206874.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use split metadata edits to assign small data sections to the correct translation units before marking units Matching.
Use local @ labels and local scope in symbols.txt for literals/floats/doubles instead of global ftCo_/lbl_ symbols when metadata indicates local ownership.
Use narrow PAD_STACK or explicit padding arrays for stack-shape closure in specific functions, with match evidence from bot report.

For stage report strings/data clusters, source may model a combined data object or use offsets into known stage data to match data layout; evidence here is a specific grbigblue hunk, not a general endorsement.

review_feedback.feedback: GALE01 report showed matched code 70.01% (+0.11%, +4304 bytes), linked code 42.35% (+0.05%, +2116 bytes), matched data 41.28% (+0.01%, +72 bytes), linked data 35.00% (+0.01%, +88 bytes).

Report listed 18 new matches, including ftCo_800BD39C, grKongo_801D5340, .sdata for ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby and ftCo_ThrownKirby, grMuteCity_801EFD0C, grOldKongo_8020F52C, ftCo_800BD1DC, two ftKb_SpecialNYs functions, and several one-byte stage function closures.
Report listed 22 improvements in unmatched items and 1 regression in an unmatched grbigblue item.

searchable_terms: More dups and a ft link
follow_up_queries: stage data report_format OSReport offset matching grBb_StageData
symbols.txt @ local labels converted from ftCo_804D3BB0
grcastle grCs_803E11A4 size split local strings

notes: PR identity, changed files, merge time, and bot report are strong.
Raw diff is truncated, so several changed files are known only from changed-file metadata and bot report, not full hunks.
No human review comments were loaded; review feedback is limited to automated decomp-dev bot output.
The bot report supports match/progress claims but does not explain author intent for individual tactics.
Some data-layout/source patterns in stage files are visible only in excerpts and should not be generalized without curator review.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Fix split/symbol ownership instead of source extern literals
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2574 supports a candidate lesson that when small literals or strings are owned by adjacent translation-unit data ranges, edits should go through splits.txt and symbols.txt and remove source-level extern literal declarations rather than preserving fake declarations in C.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stack padding tactics need narrow verifier evidence
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2574 provides a concrete example where PAD_STACK and explicit pad arrays were used only in specific near-complete functions and are paired with an automated report showing those functions became 100% matched.

source_update_candidates.title: ftCo_CaptureKirby and ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby marked Matching in PR2574
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_CaptureKirby.c and melee/ft/chara/ftCommon/ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby.c from NonMatching to Matching; bot report lists ftCo_CaptureKirby function/.sdata new matches and CaptureWaitKirby .sdata new match.
source_update_candidates.reason: Build-status/path facts are source-owned and should be curated from repo metadata, not promoted by intake.

source_update_candidates.title: Kirby capture .sdata split ranges adjusted in PR2574
source_update_candidates.text: splits.txt changed ftCo_CaptureKirby .sdata to 0x804D3BB0-0x804D3BC8 and added .sdata ranges 0x804D3BC8-0x804D3BE0 for ftCo_CaptureWaitKirby and 0x804D3BE0-0x804D3BF8 for ftCo_ThrownKirby.
source_update_candidates.reason: Split ownership is a path/source fact candidate.

source_update_candidates.title: Several ftCo literals converted to local @ symbols in PR2574
source_update_candidates.text: symbols.txt replaced ftCo_804D3BB0 through ftCo_804D3BF0 and ftCo_804D8BA8 through ftCo_804D8BC8 style symbols with local @ labels and local scope for the affected .sdata/.sdata2 entries.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol scope/name facts require curator/source validation.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate stage data/report string modeling pattern from PR2574
source_update_candidates.text: grbigblue.c introduced grBb_StageData containing StageData plus report_format and changed OSReport to use offsets into stage data; several stage files improved data matching. This may indicate a reusable stage-data modeling pattern, but the loaded diff is truncated and includes a grbigblue regression.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential pattern is promising but not safe as a global standard from this slice alone.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all string literals should become named or local @ symbols; this PR only shows specific metadata changes for particular addresses.

Do not treat pointer arithmetic into stage data for OSReport strings as generally preferred style; current standards caution against data/literal churn without ownership evidence, and this PR has only partial stage hunks plus one bot-reported regression.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or intent; no review comments were loaded.
Do not claim all 20 changed files are fully understood; several are supported only by file metadata and bot report because the diff excerpt is truncated.
